programs.title: Transitional Housing
programs.subtitle: Shared Supportive Living
programs.description: Safe, stable housing with community guidelines and case management.
programs.details: Our transitional housing program provides women with a secure environment to rebuild their lives. Each resident receives personalized case management, access to supportive services, and a community of peers on similar journeys.

programs.title: Employment Readiness & Job Navigation
programs.description: Resume help, job search coaching, workplace skills, employer referrals.
programs.details: We help women develop the skills and confidence needed to secure and maintain employment. Our program includes resume building, interview preparation, workplace etiquette training, and connections to employer partners.

programs.title: Life Skills Workshops & Peer Mentoring
programs.description: Goal-setting, budgeting, wellness, communication, conflict resolution.
programs.details: Our comprehensive life skills program equips women with practical tools for daily living and personal growth. Through workshops and one-on-one mentoring, participants build confidence and capabilities for independent living.

programs.title: Family Reunification Support
programs.description: Navigation for visitations, parenting resources, reunification planning.
programs.details: We understand the importance of family connections. Our program helps women navigate the complex process of reunification, providing resources and support for rebuilding healthy family relationships.

programs.title: Resource Referrals
programs.description: Legal aid, Medi-Cal, childcare, transportation, mental health providers.
programs.details: We connect women with essential community resources and services. Our extensive network of partners ensures comprehensive support for all aspects of rebuilding and stabilization.
